messages.content:
Once an order is in "processed" status, it cannot be cancelled or modified. However, you might be able to redirect the package through the carrier once it ships, depending on their policies.

If the order is delivered to the wrong address, you can initiate a return or exchange once it is delivered. If you need further assistance with this, feel free to reach out.

If you have any other questions or need further assistance, please let me know!
